features.name: Sentence Similarity Search
features.description: A viewer and widget set that lets users search a text column for semantically similar sentences, and inspect pairwise distances between them in real time.
features.evidence_summary: Four entities share 'Sentence'/'Similar'/'Distance' naming and viewer/widget roles, and the main NLP help page describes this as the package's primary interactive search capability.

features.name: Text Embeddings
features.description: Computes dense vector embeddings for text columns (UMAP-based and sentence-level), serving as the backbone for dimensionality reduction, clustering, and radial coloring of text data.
features.evidence_summary: Three functions are named around 'Embeddings', share dimRedPreprocessingFunction / embedding retrieval roles, and changelog entries explicitly describe an SBS approach to embeddings computation and tuned clustering defaults.

features.name: Stemming-Based Search
features.description: Adds stemming-aware search and filtering for text columns, including a Stem Column transform and context/distance edit panels introduced in v1.0.7.
features.evidence_summary: The Stem Column function, three changelog entries exclusively describing 'SBS' (Stemming-Based Search) tools and their help documentation, form a self-contained release theme.

features.name: Sentiment Analysis
features.description: Detects polarity and emotion sentiment in text using multiple complementary approaches: rule-based VADER lexicon, ML-based polarity detection, and R-based emotion classification.
features.evidence_summary: All three scripts share 'Sentiment' in their names and their descriptions uniformly describe polar/emotion detection, forming an obvious thematic cluster.

features.name: Text Summarization
features.description: Produces extractive summaries of documents using the TextRank graph-based algorithm.
features.evidence_summary: Single script with an unambiguous description ('Extractive Text Summarization Using TextRank Algorithm') representing a standalone NLP capability.

features.name: Language Detection & Text Statistics
features.description: Identifies the language of a text and provides readability/complexity statistics, giving users a quick profile of their text data quality.
features.evidence_summary: Both scripts operate on raw text at the metadata/quality level (language and readability) rather than on meaning, making them natural companions for a text-profiling workflow.

features.name: Translation
features.description: Provides an in-context translation widget that accepts a file input and renders translated text as a Datagrok panel.
features.evidence_summary: Named 'Translation' with a file→widget signature; no other function overlaps with this capability.

features.name: Text Extraction
features.description: Extracts plain text content from binary files (PDFs, Office documents, etc.) to feed downstream NLP scripts.
features.evidence_summary: Standalone Python script described explicitly as 'Extracts text from a file', serving as an ingestion pre-step for other NLP features.
